jd_text: JOB OPENING FOR DHAKA, BANGLADESH !!!ATTRACTIVE PACKAGE!!! $8,000 - $10,000 USD + Expat Benefits About the Role: We are seeking an experienced Construction Technical Director to lead the technical and engineering oversight of a major high-rise project. You will supervise a multidisciplinary design and planning team, ensuring constructability, coordination, and compliance throughout the design and construction phases. This is a senior leadership role requiring deep technical expertise, strong management skills, and the ability to drive efficiency without compromising quality or safety. Key Responsibilities: 1. Engineering Oversight Supervise design managers in coordinating architectural, structural, MEP, façade, and specialist designs. Lead the review of Issued for Construction (IFC) documentation across all disciplines. Identify and resolve interface conflicts between systems during design and pre-construction. Assess design assumptions against construction constraints (e.g., logistics, crane reach, sequencing) and recommend buildability improvements. Oversee contractor submissions (shop drawings, method statements, materials) to ensure compliance with specs and design intent. Drive value engineering exercises to optimize specifications and reduce rework risks. Interface with client consultants and internal teams to clarify design intent and resolve technical issues. 2. Construction Methods & Site Logistics Define and validate construction approaches for structural works (conventional, jump form, table form), façade installation, and MEP systems. Evaluate site logistics plans, including crane placement, hoist routes, material flow, and staging areas. Ensure contractor method statements are technically sound and aligned with safety, phasing, and site constraints. 3. Construction Planning & Scheduling Oversee the preparation and maintenance of the master construction schedule. Ensure schedule logic reflects approved methodologies and protects critical path activities. Coordinate sequencing across structural, façade, and MEP works to minimize conflicts and optimize workflow. Monitor schedule performance and lead recovery planning when required. Required Experience & Skills: 15+ years of experience delivering high-rise projects with a design & build contractor. Proven ability to manage multidisciplinary coordination from design through construction. Experience supervising design managers and integrating design outputs into construction planning. Strong working knowledge of BIM processes and using models for coordination and optimization. Hands-on experience in construction method planning, scheduling, and workflow management. Technically grounded, pragmatic, and confident in site-based problem-solving and executive reporting. Education: Bachelor’s degree in Civil/Structural Engineering (mandatory). Master’s degree in Construction Management, Project Management, or related field (preferred).
